scripts.pretest: pkill -f 'node.*playwright.*test' 2>/dev/null ; pkill -f 'playwright/lib/common/process' 2>/dev/null ; pkill -f 'chrome-headless-shell' 2>/dev/null ; pkill -f 'ffmpeg.*playwright' 2>/dev/null ; rm -rf test-results ; true
scripts.kill: pkill -f 'node.*playwright.*test' ; pkill -f 'playwright/lib/common/process' ; pkill -f 'playwright.*test-server' ; pkill -f 'chrome-headless-shell' ; pkill -f 'ffmpeg.*playwright' ; echo 'Playwright processes killed'
scripts.report:all: open reports/monocart/dashboard.html && open reports/monocart/archive.html && open reports/monocart/index.html && open reports/monocart/brand-chart.html && open reports/monocart/spec-breakdown.html && open reports/monocart/flaky-tests.html && open reports/monocart/test-duration.html && open reports/monocart/error-breakdown.html
